chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الزَّرْعِ وَ الْغَرْسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 125 – What is to be said during the cultivation and the planting

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/338)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/338)
text: لَا تَقْطَعُوا الثِّمَارَ فَيَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمُ الْعَذَابَ صَبّاً.

en.hubeali: From Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Bin Basheer, from Ibn Muzarib,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not cut down the fruit-bearing trees, for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Send upon you a difficult Punishment’.
en.sarwar: 9. It is narrated from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Al-Husayn ibn Bashir from ibn Mudarib who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not cut down a fruit bearing tree; Allah will send on you a great suffering.’”
